name: countercyclical
description: Reads Countercyclical investments, valuations, research memos, teams, assumptions, and pipelines, and creates investments, through the Countercyclical REST API.

risk.read: external Countercyclical API read of investment and valuation data
risk.write: external mutation: creates a new Investment record in the caller's workspace; no update/delete actions are exposed
risk.approval: required for the create_investment write action; read-only otherwise
